title: On the uniqueness of the strictly convex quadrilateral central configuration with a fixed angle

errors.description: The error in Proposition 2 and Lemma 1 is that their equations or proof steps are incorrect, undermining the validity of subsequent results and the main conclusion of the paper.
Lemma 1 contains incorrect equations or logical steps, undermining the validity of the proof and making the results that rely on it, including Proposition 2 and the main theorem, unreliable.
